title: Metrics Dashboard
description: Build a metrics dashboard app. Create an Orders table (amount, status, created_at). Build a page that shows multiple charts — total by status (pie), orders over time (line), amount by status (bar). Include auth so only logged-in users see the dashboard. POST /api/orders creates (auth required), GET /api/orders lists. The page displays the 3 charts reading from all orders.
skeleton:
build for web and javascript backend

create a Orders table:
  amount (number), required
  status, default 'pending'
  created_at_date, auto

allow signup and login

# Endpoints + dashboard page with 3 charts here
# Use: chart of Orders by status — chart of Orders by amount — etc.
